case_title: SKYLINE REALTY, INC. VS. CHRIS GAEDE et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON A BREACH; FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GAEDE, CHRIS
